If you are using a screen reader and are having problems using this website, please call (888) 226-0076 for assistance. Please note, this number is for accessibility issues and is not a ticketing hotline.
Have a Question?

APRIL 10-12 & APRIL 17-19, 2026
Advance Sale Happening Now
Payment plan starting at $49 down + equal monthly payments through December 2025.
Purchase W1
Purchase W2
  • 2026 Pass Types
  • 2026 Advance Sale Info
  • Bundle Hotel & Passes

Hotels & Passes

Bundle your festival passes with local resort accommodations and Coachella Shuttle transportation. Prices vary. Official Hotel Packages are on sale now for both Coachella weekends and sold exclusively through Valley Music Travel.

PURCHASE NOW

Payment Plan

More time to plan and more time to pay for your passes over time. Turn on the payment plan at checkout for your only chance to buy passes for just $49 down and split the rest into equal monthly payments through December.

Learn More

Introducing Group Car Camping

Car camping with your multi-car crew has just been made easier. Get a group of 10-20 car camping spots in one purchase. Arrive at your leisure to join your group.

Learn More

Watch 2025 Highlights

Explore top highlights and performances from both weekends of the festival, now on YouTube.
